summary: Frontend testing complete for Biz Ascend RAD demo mode. All core features pass except public questionnaire which doesn't support demo mode. Testing focused on: Demo mode login, Dashboard with stats/sector distribution, Projects list with search/filter, Organization Settings page (admin), Scores page buttons.

integration_issues.issue: Public questionnaire page uses direct fetch('/api/assess/...') instead of apiFetch helper, so demo mode tokens don't work. Results in 404 error and redirect to login page.
integration_issues.priority: LOW - affects demo mode only, real API works

action_items: Consider updating PublicAssessPage to support demo mode tokens (use demoApiFetch for tokens starting with 'demo-')

success_rate.backend: N/A (all APIs MOCKED in demo mode)

seed_data_creation: Using demo mode with mock data from /app/lib/mockData.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core demo mode features pass. Public questionnaire doesn't work in demo mode (tokens like demo-token-abc are not handled). All APIs are MOCKED in demo mode via demoApiFetch function.

demo_mode_login.details: Explore Demo button visible and functional, redirects to #/dashboard

dashboard_stats_cards.details: All 4 cards visible: Total Projects (7), Active Diagnostics (2), Completed (4), Consultants (4)

dashboard_sector_distribution.details: Sector Distribution visible for admin user, shows 7 sectors

projects_list_page.details: Shows 7 total projects, search input visible, status filter visible, project cards display correctly

organization_settings_page.details: Admin-only nav item visible, page loads with Organization Details, Plan & Usage (Enterprise), Branding & Customization, Save Settings button

scores_page_buttons.details: All buttons visible: Export CSV, Send to Client, View Report, Download PDF, Generate AI Report

public_questionnaire.details: URL /assess/demo-token-abc redirects to login with 404 errors - PublicAssessPage doesn't use demo mode, makes direct API calls

screenshots: 01_login_page.png - Login page with Explore Demo button
02_dashboard.png - Dashboard with stats cards and sector distribution
06_scores_page.png - Scores page with all action buttons
mocked_apis_note: ALL API calls in demo mode return mock data via demoApiFetch function in /app/lib/mockData.js. Real Supabase API not used in demo mode.
